title: Invocation tuple (String, Value, String) is load-bearing wire format — defend against newtype pressure
description: Invocation = (String, serde_json::Value, String) is the correct representation for RFC 8620 §3.2's 3-element JSON array wire format. A contributor might suggest a struct with named fields. Reject: serde's tuple serialization maps this directly to [methodName, args, callId] with zero extra code. Named-field structs require #[serde(rename_all)] and custom ordering. The positional access (.0/.1/.2) is only used in tests and internal extract_response — callers use destructuring.
